name: Energy & Power
description: Electrical and energy system documentation, including shore power, cold ironing, and power availability studies.

name: Cyber Compliance
description: Cyber and digital compliance documentation, including IMO cyber risk management and terminal IT requirements.

name: Class Certification
description: Classification society certification, including class status, hull and machinery, and cargo containment system certification.

name: Flag Certification
description: Statutory and flag state certification documents, including SOLAS, MARPOL, ISM, and other flag-issued certificates.

name: Vessel Design
description: Vessel design and technical data, including structural drawings and technical specifications.

name: Environmental Compliance
description: Environmental and emissions compliance documentation, including EEDI, EEXI, CII, and supporting records.

name: Vetting & OCIMF
description: Safety and vetting documents aligned with OCIMF requirements, including SIRE, TMSA, and VPQ submissions.

name: Terminal Compatibility
description: Terminal and berth compatibility documents, including terminal-specific questionnaires, ESD compatibility, and gas forms.

name: Operations & Manuals
description: Operational procedures and manuals, including cargo operations manuals and emergency response documentation.

name: Mooring & Berthing
description: Mooring and berthing analysis, including mooring loads, berthing energy, and environmental limits.
